diagrams.title: TCP/IP Model vs OSI Model
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing how TCP/IP's 4 layers map to OSI's 7 layers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding protocol layer organization and comparison with OSI model

diagrams.title: TCP Three-Way Handshake
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram showing SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK exchange between client and server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how TCP establishes reliable connections

diagrams.title: Data Encapsulation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how data is wrapped with headers at each layer as it travels from source to destination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how protocols add headers at each layer

diagrams.title: DHCP DORA Process
diagrams.description: Four-step process showing how DHCP assigns IP addresses to clients

diagrams.title: IP Address Classes
diagrams.description: Visual representation of IPv4 address classes with range and default subnet masks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding IPv4 addressing and classful addressing

visuals.title: Tcpip Protocol Suite
visuals.description: Visual diagram for tcpip protocol suite
